title: Cheesy Savory Wraps
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Indian-inspired wrap with a perfect blend of savory and cheesy goodness.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Apply a layer of savory spread to each bread piece.
Shred the Comté and regular cheese, then sprinkle it evenly over the savory spread.
Place the wraps in the skillet and cook for about 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
Flip the wraps and cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the other side is equally toasted.
Serve the cheesy wraps hot and enjoy!
